user_prompt: Generate today's pipeline report — how many applications submitted, in interview, rejected, ghosted.
actual_output:
I can generate the report, but I don’t have your application log in this chat.

Send me either:
1. your pipeline data, or  
2. a pasted list/spreadsheet export with at least:
- date
- company
- role
- status

Once you share it, I’ll summarize:
- submitted today
- in interview
- rejected
- ghosted

If you want, paste it in this format:

| Date | Company | Role | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| 2026-04-30 | Acme | Senior FE | Submitted |
| 2026-04-29 | Stripe | Frontend Engineer | Interview |
| 2026-04-28 | Notion | UI Engineer | Rejected |
| 2026-04-20 | Dropbox | SWE | Ghosted |
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that it lacked the necessary data to generate the report and provided clear instructions and a template for the user to provide that data.
